name: Tom Perez
subject: BFD
body:
We'll send you a free sticker
---
**Thanks to your hard work, House Republicans have delayed their vote to repeal Obamacare. Pitch in $3 to help Democrats keep fighting, and we'll send you a new sticker so you can show the GOP you won't back down.

** **[GET YOUR FREE STICKER](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbe0/4067b0a/2e54e9473/7e7135a2/2087760936/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Hands-Off-Obamacare-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+GET+YOUR+FREE+STICKER&utm_campaign=em_20170326_tp_nd&source=em_20170326_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170326_tp_nd")**
To borrow a phrase from my friend Joe Biden: Friday was a BFD.

When Paul Ryan decided to pull the bill, it was a rejection of the Republican Party's effort to repeal the Affordable Care Act and a repudiation of their plan that would have 24 million Americans lose their health coverage.

And it was a testament to the power of your voice.

I spent Friday morning in Detroit and Flint, making calls to Washington with Michiganders who were passionate about saving Obamacare. It was inspiring to watch grassroots Democrats in action.

Together, folks like you from across the country made thousands of calls to your members of Congress, and more than 300,000 of you signed on to petition Republicans to reject this disastrous bill.

Because you stepped up, we won a major victory in the fight to protect the Affordable Care Act.

If there's one thing I've learned in my first month as Chair of the Democratic Party, it's that nothing our party does is possible without the folks like you in Silver Spring who step up and fight for our Democratic values in every way you can.

We're relying on you to help Democrats keep winning big battles like this one. Chip in $3 or more if you're with us -- we'll send you a free sticker when you do to say thanks.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbe0/4067b0a/2e54e9473/7e7135a3/2087760936/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hands-off-obamacare?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170326_tp_nd&source=em_20170326_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170326_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbe0/4067b0a/2e54e9473/7e7135a0/2087760936/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hands-off-obamacare?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170326_tp_nd&source=em_20170326_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170326_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbe0/4067b0a/2e54e9473/7e7135a1/2087760936/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hands-off-obamacare?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170326_tp_nd&source=em_20170326_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170326_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbe0/4067b0a/2e54e9473/7e7135ae/2087760936/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hands-off-obamacare?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170326_tp_nd&source=em_20170326_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170326_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbe0/4067b0a/2e54e9473/7e7135af/2087760936/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hands-off-obamacare?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170326_tp_nd&source=em_20170326_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170326_tp_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbe0/4067b0a/2e54e9473/7e7135ac/2087760936/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/Hands-Off-Obamacare-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170326_tp_nd&source=em_20170326_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170326_tp_nd")
** Thanks,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbe0/4067b0a/2e54e9473/7e7135b4/2087760936/VEsHAA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170326_tp_nd&source=em_20170326_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170326_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbe0/4067b0a/2e54e9473/7e7135b5/2087760936/VEsHAw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=16+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170326_tp_nd&source=em_20170326_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170326_tp_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbe0/4067b0a/2e54e9473/7e7135b2/2087760936/VEsHAg/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=17+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170326_tp_nd&source=em_20170326_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170326_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cbe0/4067b0a/2e54e9473/7e7135b3/2087760936/VEsHDQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=18+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170326_tp_nd&source=em_20170326_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170326_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

And it was a testament to the power of your voice. I spent Friday morning in Detroit and Flint, making calls to Washington with Michiganders who were passionate about saving Obamacare. name: LegitAction Team
subject: If you understand this, we want you
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Cole Leystra, Middleton, WI, Treasurer
body:
These things are eroding the legitimacy of our government at an alarming pace. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46df/1c469400/2fe7dbf/35479ca/2242505461/VEsH/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/s/home?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20170326_r4w_optin3&source=20170326_r4w_optin3") Friend, We formed LegitAction because we have hope for our democracy and our country, and we are determined to make it a reality. What is really happening in this country isn't about one man in the White House, no matter how overwhelming the daily onslaught of news stories may be. It's about a decades-long assault on the pillars of our government's legitimacy. And we can work to stop it. [_**If you understand what 's really happening in this country, if you're not giving in to feeling overwhelmed -- join us. Become a part of LegitAction today.**_](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46df/1c469400/2fe7dbf/35479cb/2242505461/VEsE/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/s/home?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=2+-+If+you+understand+whatrsquos+really+happ&utm_campaign=20170326_r4w_optin3&source=20170326_r4w_optin3") Pouring dark money into our elections, and implementing voter ID laws reminiscent of the Jim Crow era, deny everyone the ability to participate fully and meaningfully in our democracy. Awarding the presidency to candidates who don't win the popular vote, and denying Supreme Court nominations to duly elected presidents, mean the voices of those who do participate don't matter like they should. Together, these things are eroding the legitimacy of our government at an alarming pace. And all of these problems are the result of concentrated, purposeful, decades-long efforts. They didn't start with Trump, and they won't stop with him. That's why supporters throughout the country are stepping up to form an organization dedicated solely to restoring legitimacy. [_**Become a part of LegitAction today and join the nationwide effort to restore our government 's legitimacy.**_](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46df/1c469400/2fe7dbf/35479c8/2242505461/VEsF/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/s/home?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=3+-+Become+a+part+of+LegitAction+today+and+j&utm_campaign=20170326_r4w_optin3&source=20170326_r4w_optin3") The problem of restoring our government's legitimacy may seem big, but we can manage it when we tackle it bill by bill, state by state -- and when we work together. We need you to work with us. Thank you for standing up for our democratic legitimacy, LegitAction Team | [TAKE ACTION »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46df/1c469400/2fe7dbf/35479c9/2242505461/VEsC/ "http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/s/home?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=4+-+TAKE+ACTIONnbspraquo&utm_campaign=20170326_r4w_optin3&source=20170326_r4w_optin3")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46df/1c469400/2fe7dbf/35479c6/2242505461/VEsD/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/advocacy-optout?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=5+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20170326_r4w_optin3&source=20170326_r4w_optin3"). If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46df/1c469400/2fe7dbf/35479c7/2242505461/VEsA/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=6+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20170326_r4w_optin3&source=20170326_r4w_optin3"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46df/1c469400/2fe7dbf/35479c4/2242505461/VEsB/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=7+-+Click+here+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=20170326_r4w_optin3&source=20170326_r4w_optin3"). Contributions or gifts to Russ for Wisconsin are not tax deductible. | Authorized and paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Cole Leystra, Middleton, WI, Treasurer
---

clean_body: These things are eroding the legitimacy of our government at an alarming pace. | "" Friend, We formed LegitAction because we have hope for our democracy and our country, and we are determined to make it a reality. What is really happening in this country isn't about one man in the White House, no matter how overwhelming the daily onslaught of news stories may be. It's about a decades-long assault on the pillars of our government's legitimacy. And we can work to stop it. "" Pouring dark money into our elections, and implementing voter ID laws reminiscent of the Jim Crow era, deny everyone the ability to participate fully and meaningfully in our democracy. Awarding the presidency to candidates who don't win the popular vote, and denying Supreme Court nominations to duly elected presidents, mean the voices of those who do participate don't matter like they should. Together, these things are eroding the legitimacy of our government at an alarming pace. And all of these problems are the result of concentrated, purposeful, decades-long efforts. They didn't start with Trump, and they won't stop with him. That's why supporters throughout the country are stepping up to form an organization dedicated solely to restoring legitimacy. "" The problem of restoring our government's legitimacy may seem big, but we can manage it when we tackle it bill by bill, state by state -- and when we work together. We need you to work with us. Thank you for standing up for our democratic legitimacy, LegitAction Team | ""

name: Team Kasich
subject: The latest
body:
Sunday morning, Gov. Kasich issued the following statement in
response to the tragic shooting in Cincinnati.

Peter, Sunday morning, Gov.
Kasich issued the following statement in response to the tragic
shooting in Cincinnati:

"I was saddened to learn about
last night's shooting in Cincinnati. Our prayers are with the
victims and families of all of those involved. I've instructed
our administration to offer any assistance the state can
provide."

Gov. John Kasich was a guest this
weekend on CNN's State of the Union, where he discussed the need
for Republican leaders to reach across the aisle and find
Democrats who will work with them to put in place meaningful
reforms for all Americans. Watch the interview (here).

The governor also shared this
message while speaking at the Fairfield County Republican Party
Lincoln Dinner on Thursday. Watch a short highlight video (here).

Ohio got some great news with the
latest job numbers showing that 16,200 new private sector jobs
were created, bringing the total to 460,300 created since Gov.
Kasich took office in January 2011.

In case you missed it, the AP
wrote a story about Gov. Kasich's recent efforts to push states
to pass resolutions calling for a Federal Balanced Budget
Amendment. Read the story (here).

Also, Fortune Magazine released
their list of the top-50 world leaders and named Gov. Kasich #12
on their list. View the list (here) and read more.

We can solve America's greatest
challenges by working together. Thank you for all that you're
doing to help us get this message out!

-Team Kasich

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/iWgyio0ldN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/oWgyio0ldN

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-42860824447-echo3-70A544974971C01ECA7F17D35422D0CE@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

subject: You’re on record
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is important. I need your commitment. |

Friend, We’re working to advance our agenda every day. I need to know you’re committed to a stronger and safer America. This is your last chance to update your record before the first quarter is over. That’s why I need you to activate your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 year.
dpwillis67@gmail.com Account Number: 141407-2017 2017 Sustaining Membership: PENDING Activation Deadline: March 31, 11:59 PM ACCEPT YOUR MEMBERSHIP Please contribute $250, $100, $65, $50, $35, $20, or $10 to accept your Sustaining Membership for the 2017 year. I’ve requested a list of every person who has stepped up and activated their 2017 Sustaining Memberships before the March 31 deadline, and I hope to see your name at the top, Friend. Activating your 2017 Sustaining Membership is about more than our movement. This is about a better future for all of us. We cannot allow the Fake News Media to flood the airwaves and mislead the American people. I need you on my team, Friend. Accept your membership today. Thank you, Donald J. Trump President of the United States

name: ben@dscc.org
subject: FWD: Defend our Supreme Court nominee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
I want to make sure you saw this email from Donald Trump's team -- we cannot let these attacks go unanswered... I want to make sure you saw this email from Donald Trump's team -- we cannot let these attacks go unanswered...
---
Friend --

Donald Trump's team sent the email below -- asking their donors to fund a "six-figure ad blitz" against "vulnerable" Democratic Senators.

**And now that Senator Chuck Schumer announced Senate Democrats will filibuster Trump's Supreme Court nominee, you know the GOP will be more fired up than ever.**

We cannot let Trump's ad blitz go unanswered, team. Senate Democrats need to know you have their backs in the Supreme Court fight.

**[Chip in $1 right now to show you're standing with Senate Democrats.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-stop-trump?refcode=DPE-20170326-Ray-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thank you,

Ben Ray
DSCC Communications Advisor

\--------FORWARDED MESSAGE--------

From: Trump Headquarters
Subject: Defend our Supreme Court nominee

Friend,

Democrats are beginning their weeks-long smear campaign to block President Trump's Supreme Court nominee, the Honorable Neil Gorsuch.

_But there's something you can do to stop them._

Our Party is launching a six-figure ad blitz in support of President Trump's nominee in twelve battleground states where vulnerable Democrats will be up for re-election in 2018.

We have enough funds to run ads for the first few days, but we'll need your help to ensure we can run ads throughout the entire duration of the Democrats' despicable smear campaign.

**[Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $20 or even just $10 to help us run ads defending President Trump's Supreme Court nominee.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-stop-trump?refcode=DPE-20170326-Ray-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
